name: VIP Customer Churn Risk Alert
description: Triggers when a VIP or Platinum customer's churn probability exceeds 0.7 based on ML churn prediction model output

dataSource.query: SELECT customer_id, customer_name, loyalty_tier, churn_probability, last_purchase_date, lifetime_value, top_churn_factors FROM ml_churn_predictions WHERE loyalty_tier IN ('VIP', 'Platinum') AND churn_probability > 0.7 AND prediction_date = CURRENT_DATE()

actions.subject: 🔔 Churn Risk: {{loyalty_tier}} Customer {{customer_name}} ({{customer_id}})

actions.message: 🔔 Churn Risk Alert | {{loyalty_tier}} customer {{customer_name}} ({{customer_id}}) | Probability: {{churn_probability}} | LTV: ${{lifetime_value}} | Last purchase: {{last_purchase_date}}
